revision.comment: Refactored piping with changed word in-template.
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to ligature |name=From a title without ligatures |from=a page name that '''''replaces [[ligature (writing)|ligatures]]''''' – ([[Æ]] or æ; [[Œ]] or œ; [[Ĳ]] or ĳ, or [[ß]]) – with their [[English language]] equivalents |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** This redirect is used for searches and leads to its target in accordance with Wikipedia [[WP:naming conventions|naming conventions]]. ** This rcat template {{em|must not}} be used to tag redirects to a title with differences that are 1: [[diacritic]]s (like {{char|◌̈}} and {{char|◌́}} – use {{tl|R to diacritic}} instead), or 2: other [[ASCII|non-ASCII]] characters that {{em|do not include}} ligatures (use {{tl|R from ASCII-only}} instead). |all category=Redirects from titles without ligatures |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to ligature |name=From a title without ligatures |from=a page name that '''''replaces [[ligature (writing)|ligatures]]''''' – ([[Æ]] or æ; [[Œ]] or œ; [[Ĳ]] or ĳ, or [[ß]]) – with their [[English language]] equivalents |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** This redirect is used for searches and leads to its target in accordance with Wikipedia [[WP:naming conventions|naming conventions]]. ** This rcat template {{em|must not}} be used to tag redirects to a title with differences that are 1: [[diacritic]]s (like {{char|◌̈}} and {{char|◌́}} – use {{tl|R to diacritic}} instead), or 2: other [[ASCII|non-ASCII]] characters that {{em|do not include}} ligatures (use {{tl|R from ASCII-only}} instead). |all category=Redirects from titles without ligatures |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** This redirect is used for searches and leads to its target in accordance with Wikipedia [[WP:naming conventions|naming conventions]]. ** This rcat template {{em|must not}} be used to tag redirects to a title with differences that are 1: [[diacritic]]s (like {{char|◌̈}} and {{char|◌́}} – use {{tl|R to diacritic}} instead), or 2: other [[:en:ASCII|non-ASCII]] characters that {{em|do not include}} ligatures (use {{tl|R from ASCII-only}} instead). |all category=Redirects from titles without ligatures |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to ligature |name=From a title without ligatures |from=a page name that '''''replaces [[:en:Ligature (writing)|ligatures]]''''' – ([[:en:Æ|Æ]] or æ; [[:en:Œ|Œ]] or œ; [[:en:Ĳ|Ĳ]] or ĳ, or [[ß]]) – with their [[:en:English language|English language]] equivalents |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** This redirect is used for searches and leads to its target in accordance with Wikipedia [[WP:naming conventions|naming conventions]]. ** This rcat template {{em|must not}} be used to tag redirects to a title with differences that are 1: [[:en:Diacritic|Diacritic]]s (like {{char|◌̈}} and {{char|◌́}} – use {{tl|R to diacritic}} instead), or 2: other [[:en:ASCII|non-ASCII]] characters that {{em|do not include}} ligatures (use {{tl|R from ASCII-only}} instead). |all category=Redirects from titles without ligatures |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to ligature |name=From a title without ligatures |from=a page name that '''''replaces [[:en:Ligature (writing)|ligatures]]''''' – ([[:en:Æ|Æ]] or æ; [[:en:Œ|Œ]] or œ; [[:en:Ĳ|Ĳ]] or ĳ, or [[ß]]) – with their [[:en:English language|English language]] equivalents |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to ligature |name=From a title without ligatures |from=a page name that '''''replaces [[:en:Ligature (writing)|ligatures]]''''' – ([[:en:Æ|Æ]] or æ; [[:en:Œ|Œ]] or œ; [[:en:Ĳ|Ĳ]] or ĳ, or [[ß]]) – with their [[:en:English language|English language]] equivalents |info=** Apply this redirect (without [[WP:PIPE|piping]]) when the subject page concerns language translation or foreign language equivalents. Other pages that use this redirect should be updated with a direct link to the redirect target (again, without piping). ** This redirect is used for searches and leads to its target in accordance with Wikipedia [[WP:naming conventions|naming conventions]]. ** This rcat template {{em|must not}} be used to tag redirects to a title with differences that are 1: [[:en:Diacritic|Diacritic]]s (like {{char|◌̈}} and {{char|◌́}} – use {{tl|R to diacritic}} instead), or 2: other [[:en:ASCII|non-ASCII]] characters that {{em|do not include}} ligatures (use {{tl|R from ASCII-only}} instead). |all category=Redirects from titles without ligatures |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
